feed.title: tiff labs
feed.subtitle: A blog about smart homes made with Home Assistant and home labs.

entry.title: Loadouts and High Fives
entry.summary: If there's a heaven, it's gotta have power tools.

entry.title: Heads Up
entry.summary: I am still around! I am working on a loadout post for a Toolsday entry I started on literally this past Tuesday but taking and editing the photos has taken some time. I’ve also started using Amazon Affiliate Links, which you can find the disclosure about on the tab sidebar. I use non-invasive analytics with GoatCounter. However I have no issue with you blocking any analytics or affiliate l...

entry.title: Toolsday
entry.summary: I am a big time sucker for gadgets of all types and that includes power and manual tools. Every Tuesday1 will be Toolsday where I highlight a particular YouTube channel, tool, or tool haul2 on the blog. Sometimes I may even do a demonstration or review of a tool I’ve had or picked up recently. I love tools and I’ve been going balls deep into Tool and DIY YouTube these past two months. Toolsda...

entry.title: Moving Proxmox to New Subnet
entry.summary: Moving Proxmox to new subnet poses challenges.

entry.title: State of the Lab: 2024
entry.summary: It’s been a almost two years since I shredded my quad and was bedridden for all of 2022 up until May of 2023. Would have spent the whole of 2023 on the streets if not for close friends and family who allowed me to setup my gear in the small room I am in now. I have managed to increase the amount of services running because of Proxmox VE Helper Scripts while learning more of the homelab ropes ...
